title: 難しいこと、大好きです！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the gym, I see Satono Diamond and
Kitasan Black arguing about something.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Don't do it, Dia! It's not safe!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: There's nothing to fret about! I'll be fine!
choice_data_list: What seems to be the problem?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness you're here! Please, you have
to help me stop her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They tell me how the gym's treadmill has a
"lunatic" setting that's so difficult, nobody has
managed to conquer it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond, brimming with unbridled
curiosity, is apparently determined to be the first
one to do it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If no Umamusume has ever been able to run on
that speed, that must mean it's extremely
dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita, please don't try to stop me. You know how I
am.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's no fun to draw conclusions on something
before trying it out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I won't fail this endeavor! I swear it!
choice_data_list: Let's see how fast it really is first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I appreciate your words of
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know I can do it. Just watch and see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets the speed to lunatic, and the machine
starts emitting a high-pitched zipping noise as the
belt starts spinning at blinding speed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So this is how fast it is... I can't wait to try this!
Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia, nooo! Don't do it! It's too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We somehow manage to stop the
overenthusiastic Satono Diamond before she
does something reckless.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Fine. Seeing as a trainer is the one
suggesting caution, I suppose this does require
prior investigation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets the speed to lunatic, and the machine
starts emitting a high-pitched zipping noise as the
belt starts spinning at blinding speed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I told you, Dia! It's too dangerous! You can't start
running at that speed without any preparation!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right... Then I'll simply have to work
my way up to it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll start with the exercise bike on the highest
"catastrophe" difficulty!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
N-noooo! No one's been able to do that one
either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We somehow manage to stop the
overenthusiastic Satono Diamond before she
does something reckless.
